fields.helpText: The value of this field is the name of a SOP-class for which 'Extended SOP Negotiation' is supported.

The value of this field is the name of the entry-point that will be called as a subroutine when information is to be read for this SOP-class.   In the value of this field, the caret that would normally separate the label from the routine-name is replaced by a dot.

The value of this field is the name of the entry-point that will be called as a subroutine when information is to be written for this SOP-class.   In the value of this field, the caret that would normally separate the label from the routine-name is replaced by a dot.
